titles.en: The Merits of the Ziyārah of the Grave of ‘Abdil ‘Ażǐm ibn ‘Abdillāh Al-Ĥasani in Ray
The Merits of the Ziyārah of the Grave of ‘Abdil ‘Ażǐm ibn ‘Abdillāh Al-Ĥasani in Ray

segments: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الْعَسْكَرِيِّ (ع) فَقَالَ أَيْنَ كُنْتَ فَقُلْتُ زُرْتُ الْحُسَيْنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ (ع) فَقَالَ أَمَا إِنَّكَ لَوْ زُرْتَ قَبْرَ عَبْدِ الْعَظِيمِ عِنْدَكُمْ لَكُنْتَ كَمَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَيْنَ ع
arabic.text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الْعَسْكَرِيِّ (ع) فَقَالَ أَيْنَ كُنْتَ فَقُلْتُ زُرْتُ الْحُسَيْنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ (ع) فَقَالَ أَمَا إِنَّكَ لَوْ زُرْتَ قَبْرَ عَبْدِ الْعَظِيمِ عِنْدَكُمْ لَكُنْتَ كَمَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَيْنَ ع

segments: 1. ‘Ali ibn Ḥusain ibn Mūsā ibn Bābawayh narrated to me from Muḥammad ibn Yaḥyā Al-‘Aťťār, from someone who was from Ray, who said: I went to Abil Ḥasan Al-‘Askari (Imam Hādi (a.s.)) and he asked me, “Where are you coming from?” I replied, “I went to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain ibn ‘Ali (a.s.).” Imam (a.s.) said, “If you had gone to the Ziyārah of the grave of Abdil ‘Ażīm who is (buried) near you, you would have been like those who have gone to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain (a.s.).”
en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani.text: 1. ‘Ali ibn Ḥusain ibn Mūsā ibn Bābawayh narrated to me from Muḥammad ibn Yaḥyā Al-‘Aťťār, from someone who was from Ray, who said: I went to Abil Ḥasan Al-‘Askari (Imam Hādi (a.s.)) and he asked me, “Where are you coming from?” I replied, “I went to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain ibn ‘Ali (a.s.).” Imam (a.s.) said, “If you had gone to the Ziyārah of the grave of Abdil ‘Ażīm who is (buried) near you, you would have been like those who have gone to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain (a.s.).”

narratorChain.raw: 1 حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى بْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى الْعَطَّارِ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَهْلِ الرَّيِّ قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى بْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ
